name: safety-video-harness
description: Codex harness for storyboard-first safety training video production.

interface.shortDescription: Storyboard-first safety video harness for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Plans safety training videos from source materials, controls storyboard and image approval gates, records QA evidence, and prepares Codex imagegen and Higgsfield Seedance workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the safety-video-harness workflow. Start with an intake interview, keep live image/video/TTS calls blocked until approval, then build storyboard, image prompts, QA evidence, and dry-run video plans.
